name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
For every {Marvelous Cuisine} in hand, Karen's HP Recovery effect +[Arg4]%, up to 3 stacks. Every time {Marvelous Cuisine} is played, Karen inflicts +[Arg3]% {Poison} during this battle, up to 20 stacks.
